faq.question: How do you source your diamonds and gemstones?
faq.answer: All FRT Studios equipment and services meet the highest industry standards for commercial photography.

faq.question: Do you offer custom designs or size customization?
faq.answer: Yes, our bespoke design team provides custom drawings, wax molds, and specific gemstone setting adjustments. Sizing for standard ring orders is fully customizable between sizes 4 and 10.

faq.question: What is the FRT Studios satisfaction guarantee?
faq.answer: We stand by our craftsmanship. Every purchase is backed by a lifetime warranty covering prong tightening, professional ultrasonic cleaning, and repolishing. Gemstone replacement is subject to inspection.

faq.question: Is the shipping fully insured?
faq.answer: Yes. Every delivery is sent in discreet, unbranded tamper-evident security boxes and is fully insured by Lloyd's of London until the parcel is signed for upon receipt.

returns.title: Complimentary 30-Day Returns
returns.content: We offer insured, complimentary returns and exchanges on all unworn items within 30 days of receiving your package. Custom-designed rings and custom engraved bracelets are eligible for size adjustments but cannot be refunded.

privacy.title: Your Privacy & Data Security
privacy.content: At FRT Studios, we use advanced TLS encryption for payment gateways, never store credit card records, and strictly protect your order metadata from third-party advertising brokers.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions of Premium Services
terms.content: Access and operations on FRT Studios platforms are governed by premium consumer protection rules. Prices are subject to service scope updates and are finalized at check-out.
